title: Auction House Conflict
description: At the decennial auction in Qingyang City, you spent all your Spirit Stones on a Foundation Establishment Pill. As you step out, Young Master Wang blocks your path, tosses 10 Spirit Stones at you, and demands the pill.

choices.text: Use your strength to slap the young master's face!
Endure the humiliation and hand over the pill.

title: Slum Black Market
description: Sneaking into the city's slums, you find a hidden black market. A masked merchant offers a 'Supreme Foundation Establishment Pill' for half the market price, but it reeks of blood.

choices.text: Buy the blood-reeking pill.
Draw your weapon and rob the pill!

title: Mortal Plague
description: Passing through a mortal village at the foot of the mountain, you discover a strange plague spreading due to leaking demonic energy. Hundreds are crying out in agony.

choices.text: Consume herbs to brew an antidote and save them.
Collect the plague aura to refine a Poison Pill.

title: Rogue Cultivator Scam
description: Wandering the market, a mysterious ragged old man pulls you aside, offering to sell the 'Nine Turns Divine Art' for only 50 Spirit Stones.

choices.text: Gamble and buy it.
Coldly expose and chase away the old man.

title: Beast Tide Sweeps Mortals
description: Violent beasts swarm down the mountain, slaughtering a mortal village. You happen to be passing by.

choices.text: Set up a defensive array to protect the mortals.
Ignore the mortals and harvest beast corpses.

title: Demonic Invasion
description: The sky turns blood red as dense demonic energy suffocates the area. A horde of demonic cultivators breaches the defenses, slaughtering everyone in sight.

choices.text: Fight to the death to protect the innocent.
Surrender and offer them mortal blood to survive.

title: Grand Decennial Auction
description: The city is highly prosperous, hosting a grand auction. Rare treasures and supreme martial fragments are displayed, but the prices are astronomical.

choices.text: Spend a fortune to buy a Supreme Manual Fragment.
Try to pickpocket a distracted VIP guest.

title: Market Crash Scavenging
description: Due to a surplus of goods, the market has crashed. Desperate merchants are dumping raw spirit herbs on the streets at dirt-cheap prices to cut losses.

choices.text: Spend a little money to hoard cheap herbs.
Threaten the bankrupt merchants to hand over goods for free.

title: Young Master's Oppression
description: At the grand auction, Young Master Wang uses his overwhelming wealth to maliciously outbid and humiliate you over a supreme treasure.

choices.text: Slap his face and ambush him outside the city to take the treasure back!
Swallow your anger and endure the humiliation.

title: Soul Festival
description: You stumble upon a rare Soul Festival in the city where spirits and mortals gather, overflowing with mystical energies.

choices.text: Join the spirits and build relationships.
Study the sacred scriptures left at the altar.

title: Skyrocketing Herb Prices
description: Due to a severe shortage, the price of spirit herbs has skyrocketed! The market is in a frenzy, offering a perfect opportunity for hoarding and speculation.

choices.text: Take advantage of the chaos to speculate and profit.
Rob a merchant convoy carrying rare herbs.

title: Demonic Activity in Town
description: Demonic cultivators have appeared in the town's outskirts, significantly reducing security. Cultivators are warned to stay away.

choices.text: Hunt down the demonic cultivators to protect the town.
Ignore the warning and go about your business.

title: Illicit Demonic Caravan
description: Due to poor city security and rising demonic infiltration, a suspicious merchant caravan sets up shop in an alley, secretly selling forbidden Demonic path materials.

choices.text: Quietly buy a Blood Crystal to accelerate your progress.
Report them to the city guards for a bounty.

title: Mortal Rebellion
description: City morale has hit rock bottom. Starving mortals are violently rebelling against the corrupt city lord who serves the cultivation sects.

choices.text: Distribute your spirit stones to buy them food.
Help the city lord brutally suppress the mortals.

title: Corrupted Pill Vendor
description: Taking advantage of the high demonic infiltration in the city, a hooded vendor in a dark alley offers you a Foundation Establishment Pill. It's cheap, but it reeks of heavy pill-toxins and dark arts.

choices.text: Buy it! A breakthrough is worth any risk.
Refuse the wicked temptation and leave immediately.

title: Demonic Blood Raid
description: Demonic activity is peaking. A group of masked demonic cultivators sets up a blood array in the city outskirts, attempting to refine passing mortals into pills.

choices.text: Risk your life to break the array and save the mortals.
Wait in the shadows and steal the finished Blood Pill.

title: Underground Black Auction
description: City security is lax. You receive a secret invitation to an underground black auction selling stolen sect artifacts and forbidden pills.

choices.text: Spend heavily to buy a forbidden artifact.
Report the location to the righteous sects.

title: Counterfeit Manual Scam
description: With city security failing, scammers are rampant. A merchant tries to sell you a 'Heavenly Grade' manual fragment for a suspiciously low price.

choices.text: Take the risk and buy it.
Threaten the scammer to reveal his real goods.

title: Herb Monopoly Challenge
description: With the price index skyrocketing, a local merchant guild has monopolized all spirit herbs, driving prices even higher. A group of rogue cultivators plans to raid their warehouse.

choices.text: Join the raid to secure herbs for yourself.
Protect the warehouse to earn the guild's favor.

title: Demonic Merchant Trap
description: Demonic activity is high. A merchant offers you a 'Breakthrough Pill' at an impossibly low price, but you notice a faint, dark aura emanating from him.

choices.text: Buy the pill and test its efficacy.
Call out the merchant's demonic identity and engage in combat.

title: Corrupt Speculation Frenzy
description: Due to skyrocketing spirit herb prices, a group of corrupt merchants is hoarding life-saving pills to sell at ten times the cost. The city's morale is plummeting as phantoms of hunger haunt the streets,.

choices.text: Use your sect influence to join the monopoly for massive profit,.
Raid their hidden vault and distribute the pills to the poor,.

title: The Shadow Ritual
description: Demonic activity has reached a fever pitch. In the city's slums, you find a ritual using phàm nhân (mortal) children to birth a new Demonic Seed,.

choices.text: Risk a direct clash with the cult to stop the ritual and save the mortals,.
Wait for the ritual to conclude, then kill the cultists and take the Demonic Seed for yourself,.

title: Mysterious Wandering Merchant
description: The city's price index is low. A wandering merchant from a distant land offers rare spiritual materials at prices that seem too good to be true.

choices.text: Invest your spirit stones and buy materials in bulk.
Haggle aggressively for a rare cultivation pill.

title: Corrupt Guard Extortion
description: City security is low. A corrupt captain of the guard accuses you of smuggling forbidden demonic artifacts and demands a 'settlement' fee.

choices.text: Pay the bribe to avoid legal trouble with the city.
Defend your honor and fight the corrupt guards.

title: The Starving Mob
description: City morale has reached a critical low. A desperate mob of starving mortals is blocking your path, demanding spirit stones to buy food from the price-gouging merchants.

choices.text: Generously distribute your spirit stones to feed them.
Use your spiritual pressure to forcefully disperse the mob.

title: City Guard Mutiny
description: City security and morale have collapsed. The guards, unpaid for months, have turned into looters, terrorizing the merchants they once protected.

choices.text: Slay the rogue guards to restore order.
Join the guards and raid the local merchant guild.

title: Riot of the Starving Phantoms
description: City morale has collapsed due to price-gouging. Starving mortals are attacking cultivator convoys for any scraps of spirit energy.

choices.text: Distribute your spirit herbs to appease the mob.
Brutally suppress the riot to restore market order.

title: Mystical Lantern Festival
description: The city is highly prosperous and spiritual Qi is dense. A grand festival is held where lanterns infused with soul power fill the sky, creating a resonance with the Heavenly Dao.

choices.text: Release a lantern and make a wish for your Dao journey.
Quietly collect the falling soul essence from the lanterns.

title: Black Market Smuggling
description: The price index is skyrocketing and city security is low. A hidden network of smugglers is moving forbidden spirit herbs and demonic blood stones through the city sewers.

choices.text: Ambush the smugglers and seize their cargo.
Invest your own spirit stones to fund their next run.

title: Black Market Hoarding
description: With the city's price index at an all-time high, a shadowy figure offers you a chance to join a scheme to hoard essential spiritual ores and manipulate the market.

choices.text: Invest heavily to monopolize the supply of Spirit Ores.
Expose the scheme to the City Lord for a bounty.

title: Ghost Market Whispers
description: City security is low. You find a hidden entrance to the Ghost Market, where rogue cultivators trade forbidden demonic artifacts. A masked dealer offers you a piece of 'Huyền Thiết' for a suspicious price.

choices.text: Buy the rare ore to upgrade your weapon.
Wait for the dealer to leave and ambush him.

title: The Wailing Plague
description: A mysterious plague, suspected to be a demonic curse, is ravaging the mortal population. The city's morale is at rock bottom as phàm nhân die by the hundreds.

choices.text: Exhaust your Qi to heal the dying mortals.
Ignore them; mortal lives are but fleeting smoke.

title: City Resource Embargo
description: The city is under a resource embargo due to high demonic activity. Prices have reached extreme levels, and the black market is the only way to survive.

choices.text: Risk smuggling essential herbs into the city for profit.
Work as a guard for the few remaining legal caravans.

title: City Spirit Tide
description: Due to a massive surge in global spiritual Qi, the city's spiritual wells have overflowed. A literal tide of energy washes through the streets, momentarily turning the marketplace into a supreme cultivation ground.

choices.text: Sit in the middle of the street and absorb the tide.
Use your flasks to gather the condensed spiritual liquid to sell later.

title: Demonic Market Raid
description: City security is high and demonic activity is rising. The City Lord calls for volunteers to raid a secret demonic market discovered beneath the city's slums.

choices.text: Join the city guards and strike the cultists.
Secretly tip off the market in exchange for a 'donation'.

title: Huyền Thiết Black Market
description: City security is low and the price index is rising. A rogue cultivator is secretly selling 'Huyền Thiết' stolen from a sect convoy, useful for crafting superior weapons.

choices.text: Pay spirit stones to buy the illegal ore.
Report the location to your sect deacons for a reward.

title: Corrupt City Lord's Tax
description: City morale and security are low. The corrupt City Lord has imposed a 'Spiritual Protection Tax' on all visiting cultivators to fund his private army.

choices.text: Pay the tax to maintain a low profile.
Secretly incite the starving mortals to rebel against the Lord.

title: The Bread and Stone Riot
description: With skyrocketing prices and low morale, starving mortals are blocking your path, accusing cultivators of hoarding the world's lifeblood [cite: 53, 60].

choices.text: Throw spirit stones to disperse the crowd and gain karma.
Help a nearby merchant suppress the mob to earn a discount.

title: Grand Auction of the Decade
description: With city prosperity at its peak, the legendary Decade Auction has opened. Rare treasures from across the continent, including breakthrough pills and supreme manuals, are being showcased [cite: 60, 18].

choices.text: Spend a fortune to secure a guaranteed Breakthrough Pill.
Take advantage of the high prices to sell your rare ores and herbs.

title: Encountering Moc Uyen Thanh
description: At the Ancient Cave, you see Moc Uyen Thanh surrounded by demonic beasts, looking weak and calling for help.

choices.text: Lend a hand, cannot leave her to die.
Sense something is wrong and leave quietly.

title: Saving a Demonic Cultivator
description: In the pouring rain, you find a woman in black robes collapsed by the road, covered in blood. Her aura is cold and reeks of demonic energy. Righteous cultivators are searching nearby.

choices.text: Use a Blood Recovery Pill to save her.
Call the righteous cultivators to capture her.

title: Abyssal Whispers
description: While cultivating in seclusion in a remote cave, you hear murmurs echoing from an underground spring, promising unmatched power and infinite lifespan if you abandon your Dao Mind.

choices.text: Keep your mind clear and reject the demonic voice.
Open your mind and embrace the evil power.

title: Black Roadhouse Inn
description: In the dark wilderness, you stop at a dimly lit inn. The sly old innkeeper serves a bowl of braised meat that has a strange but incredibly appetizing spiritual aura.

choices.text: Carefully avoid eating and stay awake to defend yourself.
Feast on the meat and go to sleep.

title: Blood Sacrifice Array
description: While patrolling, you discover a wicked array absorbing mortal blood to condense a Blood Pill.

choices.text: Risk your life to destroy the array.
Wait for completion and steal the pill.

title: Qi Deviation Crisis
description: Rising demonic energy triggers your inner demons during meditation. The spiritual Qi in your meridians turns chaotic, threatening to explode.

choices.text: Use the chaotic energy to forcefully increase cultivation!
Bite your tongue and brutally suppress the energy.

title: Demonic Qi Overload
description: The world's demonic energy is so dense it begins to seep into your meridians during regular rest, causing a violent struggle between your spiritual Qi and the dark aura.

choices.text: Attempt to refine the demonic Qi into your own power.
Focus entirely on expelling the darkness from your body.

title: Shadow of the Demonic Path
description: High demonic energy has emboldened dark cultivators. A skilled demonic assassin ambushes you from the shadows, seeking to steal your cultivation base.

choices.text: React instantly and engage in a deadly duel.
Use an escape talisman to flee, leaving your treasures behind.

title: Visions of the Void
description: Dense demonic energy surrounds you during meditation. Visions of a dark void begin to tempt your mind, promising power in exchange for your humanity.

choices.text: Embrace the visions and harness the void energy.
Recite the Heart-Cleansing Sutra to purge the corruption.

title: Whispers of the Demonic Seed
description: As demonic energy saturates the world, a dark voice begins to whisper in your mind during meditation, offering forbidden power to bypass your current bottleneck.

choices.text: Listen to the whispers and embrace the dark shortcut.
Seal your senses and protect your righteous Dao Heart.

title: Interrupting the Blood Sacrifice
description: You stumble upon a hidden ritual where demonic cultivators are sacrificing mortals to fuel their dark energy. The atmosphere is heavy with the smell of iron and death.

choices.text: Risk your life to slay the cultists and save the survivors.
Wait for the ritual to end, then loot the abandoned demonic tools.

title: Heart Demon Resonance
description: The world's demonic energy is overflowing, triggering a resonance with the lingering 'Pill Toxins' and repressed desires in your soul, manifested as a Heart Demon [cite: 18, 56].

choices.text: Engage in a spiritual battle to conquer your inner darkness.
Surrender to the whispers for a sudden surge in cultivation.

title: Waking Dawn
description: A cold dawn breaks. A choice appears: cultivate steadily or chase a risky shortcut.

choices.text: Practice patiently, build your foundation.
Use a risky shortcut to leap forward.

title: Duel with the Chosen One
description: Long Ngao Thien, the arrogant child of destiny, blocks your path. He points his glittering sword at you, demanding a duel to step on your dignity.

choices.text: Go all out and prove your worth!
Acknowledge his superiority and back down.

title: Spirit Herbs
description: You stumble upon mysterious spirit herbs. Their aura is intoxicating but slightly unstable.

choices.text: Refine them safely using your core techniques.
Test the raw herbs directly on yourself.
Decline the temptation and leave silently.

title: Duel Challenge
description: A wandering martial artist abruptly blocks your path, drawing their weapon and demanding a duel to hone their Dao.

choices.text: Accept the duel and prove yourself.
Avoid the confrontation but observe their stance.

title: Heavenly Dao Quake
description: Spiritual energy fluctuates violently, reaching an alarming level! An extraordinary destiny is approaching, and a hidden secret realm might be opening.

choices.text: Risk your life to absorb the violent spiritual Qi.
Search for the entrance to the opening secret realm.

title: Heavenly Qi Surge
description: The spiritual Qi of the world suddenly surges to an incredibly dense level! It completely suppresses demonic auras, but inhaling too much might overwhelm a weak body.

choices.text: Absorb the Qi madly to surge your cultivation!
Safely guide the Qi to refine it into spiritual pills.

title: Heavenly Epiphany Surge
description: The Heavenly Dao fluctuates wildly. A sudden surge of profound Dao rhythm washes over you, resonating with your meridians and presenting a rare chance for a sudden epiphany.

choices.text: Close your eyes and absorb the Dao rhythm to surge your cultivation.
Use this profound moment to deduce martial techniques.

title: Echoes of the Immortal Rift
description: A sudden spike in Dao fluctuations has caused a localized temporal rift. You hear echoes of a future breakthrough or a past failure resonating with your soul,.

choices.text: Force your mind through the rift to grasp a fragment of supreme knowledge,.
Offer your current cultivation base to the rift in exchange for a shift in destiny,.

title: Heavenly Thunder Tempering
description: Heavenly Dao is fluctuating wildly. A localized spiritual storm has summoned bolts of Heavenly Thunder. You can try to use the lightning to temper your meridians.

choices.text: Face the thunder head-on to purge your body.
Retreat to safety and avoid the deadly lightning.

title: The Lost Array of the Ancients
description: While exploring a remote area, you discover an ancient array carved into the rock. It flickers with a mysterious light, resonating with the current Heavenly Dao fluctuations.

choices.text: Use your deep comprehension to solve the puzzle peacefully.
Use sheer martial power to shatter the array's core.

title: Immortal's Tomb Emergence
description: Extreme Dao fluctuations have caused the earth to split, revealing the entrance to a majestic tomb belonging to an ancient Ascendant Immortal.

choices.text: Brave the deadly traps to enter the core burial chamber.
Stay safe and scavenge the offerings in the outer halls.

title: Heavenly Dao Resonance
description: The world's Dao fluctuates violently, causing spiritual energy to manifest as physical lotus petals falling from the sky.

choices.text: Focus on comprehending the laws of the universe.
Quickly absorb the manifestation petals for cultivation.

title: Heavenly Karma Judgment
description: Heavenly Dao fluctuations have triggered a moment of karmic clarity. The world judges your past actions, resonating with your soul's purity or corruption.

choices.text: Offer your soul to the judgment of the heavens.
Defy the judgment and rely only on your own power.

title: Accumulated Pill Toxins
description: Your over-reliance on low-grade pills to survive the lifespan race has caused 'Pill Toxins' to accumulate in your meridians. A backlash is imminent.

choices.text: Endure excruciating pain to manually cleanse the toxins.
Use a rare Snow Lotus to neutralize the toxins safely.

title: Pill Toxin Cleansing Ritual
description: Your meridians are clogged with dark residues from excessive pill consumption. A wandering healer offers a dangerous ritual to burn away the toxins using pure spiritual fire.

choices.text: Endure the excruciating spiritual fire to cleanse your body.
Refuse the ritual and try to neutralize toxins with rare herbs.

title: Fragment of the Heavens
description: Extreme Dao fluctuations have caused a physical fragment of the Heavenly Dao to fall from the sky. It radiates a rhythm that defies mortality.

choices.text: Risk your body to grasp the divine fragment.
Don't touch it; simply sit nearby and observe as it dissolves.

title: Vision of the Eternal War
description: Extreme Dao fluctuations have triggered a spiritual resonance. You see a vision of the founding Sect Leader battling a Great Demon, revealing a flaw in your current technique.

choices.text: Focus on correcting the technique's flaw to boost efficiency.
Try to memorize the Demon's forbidden moves instead.

title: Meridian Blockage Crisis
description: The high spiritual Qi in the environment is reacting violently with the 'Pill Toxins' in your body, causing a localized Qi explosion within your meridians.

choices.text: Forcefully suppress the explosion, risking permanent damage.
Vent the excess energy outwards, causing a small shockwave.

title: Ancient Spatial Rift
description: Extreme Heavenly Dao fluctuations have opened a localized spatial rift. It leads to a pocket dimension containing ancient cultivation techniques [cite: 56, 59].

choices.text: Use your high comprehension to stabilize the rift and enter safely.
Brave the chaotic space to snatch a supreme manual fragment.

title: Heavenly Nectar Rain
description: A rare phenomenon occurs when spiritual Qi peaks! Rain that directly nourishes the soul falls from the sky, bypassing ordinary bottlenecks [cite: 56, 12].

choices.text: Meditate openly to maximize tu vi gain.
Focus on collecting the rain into jade bottles for later sale.

title: Beast King Guarding the Blood Lotus
description: Deep in the core of the Myriad Beast Mountain Range, you discover a thousand-year Blood Lotus. However, coiled tightly beside it is a slumbering Blood Python Beast King.

choices.text: Set up a stealth array, steal the Blood Lotus, and run.
Walk away, your life is more important.

title: Corpse in the Swamp
description: Deep in the Myriad Beast Mountain Range, you see a Foundation Establishment cultivator's corpse half-submerged in a swamp, with a bulging storage bag still glittering on their waist.

choices.text: Use sword control or a branch to hook the storage bag.
Burn the corpse from afar to avoid future trouble.

title: Unfinished Go Game
description: Exploring a stalactite-filled cave, you find a white jade Go board. The unfinished game radiates profound Dao rhythm, likely left behind by two ascendant masters millennia ago.

choices.text: Sit down and dedicate your entire mind to solving the game.
Just bow respectfully, watch briefly, and leave.

title: Demon King's Metamorphosis
description: The sky darkens over the Myriad Beast Mountain Range. A Demon King is undergoing Heavenly Tribulation to take human form and is extremely weak.

choices.text: Protect the Demon King through the tribulation.
Take advantage of the situation and attack!

title: Secret Realm Opening
description: Heavenly Dao fluctuates violently. A spatial rift tears open in the mountains, revealing an ancient secret realm glowing with supreme spiritual energy.

choices.text: Risk your life and leap into the spatial rift.
Too dangerous. Meditate outside to absorb the leaking Qi.

title: Heavenly Treasure Emerges
description: The mountain's resources are overflowing. A rare Snow Lotus has bloomed on a cliff, attracting numerous greedy rogue cultivators who are already fighting for it.

choices.text: Sneak through the chaos to grab the Snow Lotus.
Wait for them to kill each other, then ambush the survivors.

title: Encountering Mu Wanqing
description: At the Ancient Ruins, you find Mu Wanqing, a famous inner sect beauty, surrounded by demonic beasts. She is crying weakly for help.

choices.text: Rush in to save her like a hero.
See through the trouble and walk away silently.

title: Mountain Meditation
description: The towering peaks of the ancient mountain invite you to sit and ponder the Heavenly Dao.

choices.text: Sit with the mountain's soul and listen to the silence.
Search the surrounding peaks for hidden treasures.

title: Blood Rose Ambush
description: While exploring the Myriad Beast Mountain Range, Blood Rose suddenly drops her disguise, revealing her demonic nature, and surrounds you with killing intent.

choices.text: Fight to the death and break out!
Leave your Spirit Stones behind and flee for your life.

title: Ancestral Memory
description: Deep within the ancient ruins, a mysterious resonance triggers a flood of ancient ancestral memories in your mind.

choices.text: Embrace the ancestors and nurture the legacy.
Break the old path and forge your own destiny.

title: Grave Storm
description: A terrifying spectral storm filled with resentful spirits suddenly sweeps across the ancient burial grounds.

choices.text: Stand firm and protect your Dao Heart.
Evade the pain and conserve your energy.

title: A Daoist in Distress
description: You encounter a severely injured righteous cultivator being cornered by a pack of demonic wolves. They beg you for help.

choices.text: Draw your sword and save them.
Wait for them to die, then loot their corpse.

title: Ruined Alchemy Furnace
description: In a forgotten cave, you find a cracked alchemy furnace still radiating intense, unstable medicinal Qi after centuries.

choices.text: Inhale the scorching Qi to temper your body.
Break the furnace to search for leftover pills.

title: Ancient Array Trap
description: Heavenly Dao fluctuations have revealed the entrance to an Ancient Cave Dwelling, but it is protected by a deadly and complex killing array.

choices.text: Use sheer martial power to break the array!
Sit down and use your comprehension to decipher the array.

title: Demonic Altar Discovery
description: Deep in the misty mountains, you stumble upon a hidden Demonic Altar. Fresh blood covers the runes, and a dark artifact throbs with forbidden power.

choices.text: Endure the corrupted energy and take the artifact.
Purify the altar with your cultivation base.

title: Guardian of the Millennial Ginseng
description: Deep in the Beast Mountain Range, you discover a patch of rare spirit herbs, including a Millennial Ginseng. However, a fierce demonic wolf is aggressively guarding the area.

choices.text: Engage the demonic wolf in a bloody battle for the herbs.
Hold your breath and try to steal a few herbs without alerting it.

title: Ancient Dao Stele
description: Triggered by intense Heavenly Dao fluctuations, a massive stone stele rises from the earth, radiating ancient Dao runes that resonate with your soul.

choices.text: Sit beneath the stele and meditate on the runes.
Pry a fragment off the stele to sell.

title: Beast King's Lair
description: With beast activity at a peak, you stumble upon the empty lair of a Beast King while it's out leading the beast tide. Treasures are scattered everywhere.

choices.text: Loot as much as you can and run before it returns!
Set up a killing array to ambush the weakened Beast King.

title: Miasma on the Mountain Trail
description: Rising demonic energy has created a thick, toxic miasma on the mountain trail. You hear the distorted growls of mutated beasts within the fog.

choices.text: Hold your breath and push through to find rare herbs.
Wait for the miasma to clear, losing precious time.

title: Spiritual Spring Epiphany
description: High spiritual Qi in the area has manifested a hidden spiritual spring. The water is pure and radiates profound Dao energy.

choices.text: Bathe in the spring to cleanse your meridians.
Collect the water into jade flasks to sell or use later.

title: Ghost Battlefield Scavenging
description: The mountain is littered with remains from the ongoing sect war. Ghostly wails echo as you search the area for abandoned spiritual tools and weapons.

choices.text: Deeply search the battlefield despite the spectral danger.
Use your cultivation to purify the souls of the fallen.

title: Ancient Battlefield Vision
description: High Heavenly Dao fluctuations trigger a temporal rift. You see a vision of an ancient battle between Immortals and Demons, revealing profound combat techniques.

choices.text: Immerse yourself in the vision to learn the ancient ways.
Close your eyes to protect your mind from the brutal killing intent.

title: Spirit Beast Egg Discovery
description: Mountain resources are abundant. You find a glowing Spirit Beast egg hidden in a crevice, but the parent beast is nearby, hunting for food.

choices.text: Quietly steal the egg and escape.
Leave the egg undisturbed to respect the laws of nature.

title: Night of the Blood Moon
description: The sky turns a sickly crimson. Extreme demonic energy has driven the mountain beasts into a murderous frenzy, and the veil between worlds is thinning,.

choices.text: Sit in the center of the slaughter and absorb the chaotic blood essence to surge your cultivation,.
Slay the frenzied beasts to harvest their mutated cores for crafting,.

title: Beast Mountain Landslide
description: High danger levels in the mountains have caused a massive landslide. Ancient ores are now exposed, but the area is unstable and crawling with agitated beasts.

choices.text: Risk the falling rocks to mine the exposed ores.
Hunt the beasts confused by the landslide for their cores.

title: Beast Tide Vanguard
description: Beast activity has exploded! A massive tide of monsters is rushing down the mountain. You are caught directly in the path of the beast vanguard.

choices.text: Stand your ground and slay the beasts to protect the valley.
Retreat to the rear and scavenge remains of fallen beasts.

title: The Herbalist's Hidden Garden
description: With high spiritual Qi in the mountains, a hidden array has failed, revealing a long-forgotten herb garden once owned by a legendary herbalist.

choices.text: Harvest the most precious and rare spiritual strains.
Carefully transplant seedlings back to your sect's garden.

title: Remnants of an Immortal Alchemist
description: High mountain resources have revealed a hidden cave in the Ancient Ruins. Inside, a furnace still burns with a faint, divine flame.

choices.text: Attempt to finish the ancient pill-making process.
Deconstruct the furnace for rare smelting materials.

title: Weakening of the Ancient Seal
description: High demonic energy and beast activity have weakened an ancient seal in the mountains. A terrifying aura from the era of the Ancient War is leaking out.

choices.text: Sacrifice your spiritual Qi to reinforce the seal.
Enter the fissure to scavenge for ancient artifacts.

title: Awakening of the Ancient Relic
description: Deep within the Ancient Ruins, a rusted weapon begins to resonate with the high Dao fluctuations, radiating a faint but sharp sword intent.

choices.text: Offer your essence blood to re-awaken the weapon's spirit.
Meditate on the sword intent to enhance your comprehension.

title: Corrupted Spirit Spring
description: A spiritual spring in the mountains has been corrupted by the rising demonic energy. The water glows with a sickly purple light, but its energy is still incredibly potent.

choices.text: Absorb the dark Qi to break through your limits.
Use your spiritual power to purify the water.

title: Hibernating Beast King
description: While exploring, you find the lair of a hibernating Beast King. Rare 'Linh Thảo' and 'Linh Quặng' are piled around its massive, slumbering form.

choices.text: Carefully steal the materials without waking it.
Take the opportunity to slay the beast for its core.

title: Sword Intent of the Ancient Master
description: At the Ancient Ruins, high Dao fluctuations have awakened the lingering sword intent of a long-dead master. The air itself feels sharp and lethal.

choices.text: Meditate directly within the sword intent to sharpen your mind.
Use your spiritual Qi to protect your body and collect spirit ores.

title: Cursed Herb Patch
description: Rising demonic energy has corrupted a patch of rare herbs. The spirit herbs are glowing with a dark, pulsating light, offering immense power at the cost of your soul's purity.

choices.text: Harvest the corrupted herbs and refine them into dark pills.
Burn the corrupted patch to prevent the spread of demonic Qi.

title: Ancient Ruins: The Puzzle Box
description: While exploring the Ancient Ruins, you find a metallic box sealed with a complex array. High Dao fluctuations have weakened its lock.

choices.text: Use your deep comprehension to decipher the array.
Shatter the box with sheer spiritual power.

title: Blood Moon Beast Tide
description: Beast activity has reached critical levels! Driven by the blood moon, a tide of monsters is rushing towards the mortal settlements.

choices.text: Join the defense to save the mortals.
Focus on slaying the alpha beasts for their mutated cores.

title: Residual Fire of the Ancient Furnace
description: High spiritual Qi has re-ignited a fragment of divine fire in an abandoned alchemy furnace within the Ancient Ruins. The heat is melting the surrounding stone, revealing hidden ores.

choices.text: Risk the divine fire to extract 'Huyền Thiết' from the molten stone.
Meditate near the heat to temper your fire-element spiritual root.

title: Sect War: Convoy Ambush
description: The war level is high. You are part of an escort for a sect resource convoy that has been ambushed by elite disciples of the Ten Thousand Immortals Sect.

choices.text: Fight to the death to protect the sect's resources.
Seize a portion of the resources and flee in the chaos.

title: Demonic Blood Ore Vein
description: High demonic energy has seeped into a spirit ore vein in the mountains. The ores are pulsing with a dark, blood-red light, offering high power but risking severe corruption [cite: 54, 56].

choices.text: Mine the corrupted ore to craft demonic weapons.
Use your spiritual base to purify a small portion of the vein.

title: Lost Huyền Thiết Vein
description: Abundant mountain resources have revealed a hidden cave containing a pure vein of 'Huyền Thiết'—the supreme material for crafting Earth-grade weapons [cite: 19, 54].

choices.text: Dedicate months to mining as much Huyền Thiết as possible.
Report the vein to the sect in exchange for massive merit points.

title: Tournament Finals
description: Long Ngao Thien, the child of heaven, stands on the arena waiting for you. Spiritual energy violently swirls around him.

choices.text: Go all out and prove who the real prodigy is!
Know when to retreat, surrender to save your life.

title: Corrupt Sect Deacon
description: When you arrive at the Deacon Hall to receive your mandatory annual sect quest, the fat Deacon winks at you: 50 Spirit Stones for an easy herb-gathering task. Otherwise, you go to the deepest mining tunnels.

choices.text: Grit your teeth and bribe him with 50 Spirit Stones.
Better to break than bend, go to the mines!

title: Immortal's Guidance
description: Heavenly Dao fluctuates wildly. An illusion of an ancient immortal appears in your mind, preaching the supreme Dao.

choices.text: Listen respectfully, clearing all mundane thoughts.
Give in to greed and beg for treasures.

title: Sect Rebellion
description: The sect's stability has plummeted. A deacon is assassinated in broad daylight, and rogue disciples are burning the outer sect pavilions to loot resources.

choices.text: Draw your sword and defend the sect!
Take advantage of the chaos to loot the storage.

title: Sect Conscription
description: Sect warfare has escalated drastically. Deacons are forcefully conscripting outer disciples to serve as cannon fodder at the frontline.

choices.text: Draw your sword and fight bravely for the sect!
Bribe the deacon heavily to stay in the rear.

title: Possessed Deacon
description: Demonic infiltration is severe. Late at night, you accidentally spot a highly respected Sect Deacon practicing a forbidden blood art. He notices you.

choices.text: Flee desperately and report to the Sect Leader.
Swear loyalty to him and embrace the Demonic path.

title: Cau Du's Betrayal
description: Taking advantage of sect instability, Cau Du secretly leads a group of rebel disciples to raid your cave dwelling.

choices.text: Cleanse the sect, show no mercy!
Bribe him heavily to leave you in peace.

title: Golden Core Trial
description: You discover a hidden trial left by a Golden Core master, designed to test a cultivator's readiness to break through.

choices.text: Enter the trial and risk everything for a breakthrough.
Wait and prepare yourself better.

title: Spirit Mine Collapse
description: Due to sect instability and poor maintenance, the outer sect spirit mine suddenly starts collapsing around you. Priceless ores are revealed in the rubble.

choices.text: Risk your life to dig out the precious ores.
Flee the mine immediately to survive.

title: Berserk Spirit Beast
description: A usually docile spirit beast in the outer sect's pens has gone berserk due to a demonic aura, breaking its chains and attacking disciples.

choices.text: Use your Dao Mind to calm and subdue it.
Kill it swiftly to harvest its valuable materials.

title: Ten Thousand Immortals War
description: The Ten Thousand Immortals Sect has officially declared war on the Heavenly Dao Sect! The sect is in chaos, and all disciples are ordered to the frontlines.

choices.text: Follow the orders and fight fiercely on the frontline.
Become a deserter and flee the sect.

title: Sect Internal Strife
description: Factional infighting has reached its peak. A sect deacon was assassinated, and the sect is highly dangerous with a high risk of betrayal.

choices.text: Pick a strong faction and eliminate rivals.
Seal your cave dwelling and avoid the conflict.

title: Outer Sect Tournament
description: The sect is stable and hosting its decennial Outer Sect Tournament. Disciples from all peaks gather to prove their martial prowess and win supreme pills.

choices.text: Enter the arena and fight for the championship!
Sit on the mountain and watch the tigers fight.

title: Sect Resource Famine
description: The sect's resource reserves have plummeted to a critical low. Allowances are cut, and desperate outer disciples are fighting each other over meager scraps of spirit herbs.

choices.text: Join the brawl to secure your cultivation resources.
Secretly bribe the treasury deacon for your portion.

title: Spirit Beast Mutation
description: While tending to the sect's spirit beasts, one of them swallows a strange glowing insect and begins to mutate violently, radiating intense spiritual energy.

choices.text: Use your Dao Mind to help it assimilate the power.
Kill it before it completely loses control.

title: Herb Garden Theft
description: Sect resources are dwindling. You catch a fellow outer disciple desperately stealing a spirit herb to save their dying mortal mother.

choices.text: Look the other way and pretend you saw nothing.
Arrest them and report to the deacon for a reward.

title: Corrupt Promotion Offer
description: A greedy Inner Sect Elder approaches you in secret. He offers to bend the rules and promote you to the Inner Sect early, but for a steep price.

choices.text: Pay the massive bribe for early promotion.
Refuse and rely firmly on your own strength.

title: Frenzied Spirit Beast
description: While performing your mandatory sect quest to feed the outer sect's spirit beasts, one of them, corrupted by a sudden spike in demonic energy, breaks its cage and lunges at you.

choices.text: Use your Dao Mind and cultivation to forcefully calm the beast.
Draw your weapon and slay it before it hurts others.

title: Strict Deacon Inspection
description: The sect is tightening its rules. A strict deacon stops you to inspect your annual sect contributions. He glares at you, demanding either proof of hard work or a hefty 'fine'.

choices.text: Bite your tongue and pay the hefty fine in Spirit Stones.
Refuse to pay and accept the physical punishment.

title: Traitorous Deacon
description: Sect stability is crumbling. You catch a senior deacon sneaking out with the sect's core technique manual, planning to defect to a rival sect.

choices.text: Intercept him to protect the sect's legacy!
Extort him for hush money to let him pass.

title: Sect Debt Collector
description: Sect resources are depleted. A debt-collecting deacon is making rounds, forcefully demanding 'voluntary contributions' from outer disciples to fill the treasury.

choices.text: Pay the contribution to avoid trouble.
Refuse and hide your valuables.

title: Sect Elder's Funeral
description: An inner sect elder has passed away, and the sect's stability is shaken. Rumors of a hidden legacy left to an outer disciple are spreading like wildfire.

choices.text: Sneak into the elder's forbidden peak to investigate.
Attend the funeral honorably to show your loyalty.

title: Captured Sect Rebel
description: Internal strife is high. You've cornered a fellow disciple who was caught stealing core scriptures. They beg you to let them go, claiming they only wanted to save their family.

choices.text: Execute the traitor to uphold sect law.
Accept a hidden treasure in exchange for their freedom.

title: Sect Manual Preservation
description: The Library Pavilion has caught fire during a riot. Rare manual fragments are scattered in the smoke and flames. You can only save a few.

choices.text: Risk the flames to save an Earth-grade fragment.
Save as many basic manuals as possible for the sect's future.

title: Sect Resource Leak
description: The sect's resources are at a critical low, and management is in shambles. You discover a hidden hole in the resource warehouse where spirit stones and low-grade pills are leaking out.

choices.text: Quietly pocket the leaking resources for yourself.
Report the leak to the elders to show your loyalty.

title: Alchemy Hall Explosion
description: While passing the Alchemy Hall, a massive explosion rocks the building. Smoke fills the air, and scorched remains of rare spirit herbs are scattered everywhere.

choices.text: Rush into the smoke to scavenge usable herb remains.
Use your spiritual Qi to help extinguish the fires.

title: Sect Treasury Betrayal
description: Internal stability has collapsed. You find a group of high-ranking disciples and an elder attempting to empty the treasury before defecting to a rival sect,.

choices.text: Threaten to sound the alarm unless they share the stolen artifacts with you,.
Draw your sword to protect the sect's last legacy, even if it means fighting your brothers,.

title: Meridian Cleansing Pool
description: The spiritual Qi in the sect is exceptionally dense. The legendary cleansing pool has opened its doors to outer disciples for a limited time.

choices.text: Soak deeply to cleanse your internal impurities.
Quickly gather the pool's essence into a jade vial.

title: Forced Labor Duty
description: The sect's stability is low, and the elders are demanding more from outer disciples. You have been assigned to the most dangerous section of the spirit mines as a 'mandatory contribution'.

choices.text: Accept the labor and work through the exhaustion.
Bribe the mine supervisor to give you a lighter task.

title: The Hidden Jade Chamber
description: The sect is stable and prosperous. The Sect Leader decides to open the 'Hidden Jade Chamber' for the most promising disciples, offering access to restricted knowledge.

choices.text: Study a forbidden Earth-grade scroll.
Claim a bounty of spirit stones instead of studying.

title: Frontline of the Great War
description: Sect war has reached a fever pitch. You are drafted to the frontline to defend the Spirit Mine against the Ten Thousand Immortals Sect's elite vanguard.

choices.text: Lead a counter-charge to break their formations.
Desert the battlefield and hide in the mortal world.

title: Demonic Mole Revealed
description: High demonic infiltration has compromised a Senior Deacon. You catch them transmitting sect secrets via a blood-red transmission jade.

choices.text: Publicly expose the traitor to the Law Enforcement Hall.
Blackmail them for demonic resources to keep silent.

title: Outer Sect Coup Attempt
description: Sect stability has reached a critical low. A group of radical disciples, fueled by the resource famine, is attempting to overthrow the treasury deacons.

choices.text: Stand with the deacons and suppress the rebellion.
Join the rebels to claim your 'fair share' of the treasury.

title: Sect War: Raiding Party
description: Sect warfare has escalated. You are ordered to join a high-risk raiding party to sabotage the enemy sect's spirit herb garden.

choices.text: Lead the charge into the enemy's formation.
Bribe the task official to assign you to the rear guards.

title: Sect Merit Hoarding
description: The sect is flourishing with resources. A greedy deacon is secretly allowing disciples to 'buy' merit points with large sums of spirit stones.

choices.text: Spend your savings to boost your sect reputation.
Report this corruption to the Law Enforcement Hall.

title: Sect Manual Leak
description: Internal stability is low. A corrupted librarian is secretly selling fragments of the sect's high-grade manuals to the highest bidder.

choices.text: Pay a heavy price to acquire an Earth-grade manual fragment.
Report the librarian to increase your reputation.

title: Sect Heritage Trial
description: With the sect's reputation at an all-time high, the Grand Elder opens the 'Heritage Path'—a trial designed to test a disciple's core comprehension and loyalty to the sect's founding Dao.

choices.text: Focus your mind and attempt to walk the path of the ancestors.
Don't enter the path, but try to memorize the ancient runes from the side.

title: Spirit Root Resonance Test
description: With global spiritual Qi peaking, the sect's resonance crystal has activated. It offers a rare chance to refine your Spirit Root's purity and enhance your cultivation multiplier.

choices.text: Focus your soul to refine your Spirit Root's efficiency.
Directly absorb the crystal's raw energy for immediate cultivation.

title: Sect Internal Betrayal
description: Sect stability is low and demonic infiltration is high. You catch a senior disciple attempting to poison the spirit well with demonic energy.

choices.text: Engage the traitor in a deadly duel to protect the well.
Promise silence in exchange for forbidden demonic pills.

title: Sect Pill Warehouse Breach
description: Internal stability has collapsed! A riot has broken out, and the sect's pill warehouse is being looted by desperate disciples [cite: 52, 59].

choices.text: Rush in and seize whatever pills you can carry.
Stand with the elders to defend the sect's remaining resources.

title: Sect Ancestor's Statue Awakening
description: Fueled by the sect's high reputation and spiritual Qi, the statue of the founding ancestor begins to radiate a golden light, offering guidance to the faithful [cite: 52, 57].

choices.text: Kneel and receive the ancestor's spiritual transmission.
Offer rare spirit herbs to the statue to gain the sect's favor.

title: Possession of the Deacon
description: Extremely high demonic infiltration and energy have led to a catastrophe: a senior deacon has been possessed by a demonic entity and is wreaking havoc in the outer sect [cite: 59, 55].

choices.text: Risk your life to perform an exorcism and save the deacon.
Slay the possessed deacon immediately to stop the spread.
